ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trading_pairs" (
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading pair */,
  "pair_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading pair (e.g., SUNDAE/ADA) */,
  "lp_fee" REAL /* Liquidity provider fee associated with the trading pair */,
  "pair_price" REAL /* Current price of the trading pair */,
  "pair_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the trading pair */,
  "base_currency" TEXT /* Base currency of the trading pair */,
  "quote_currency" TEXT /* Quote currency of the trading pair */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trading pair was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trading pair was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trading pair associated with the market data */,
  "total_asset_locked" REAL /* Total assets locked in the trading pair */,
  "total_ada_locked" REAL /* Total ADA locked in the trading pair */,
  "ada_volume_24h" REAL /* Volume of ADA traded in the last 24 hours */,
  "high_price_24h" REAL /* The highest price of the trading pair in the last 24 hours */,
  "low_price_24h" REAL /* The lowest price of the trading pair in the last 24 hours */,
  "price_change_24h" REAL /* The price change of the trading pair in the last 24 hours */,
  "volume_change_24h" REAL /* The volume change of the trading pair in the last 24 hours */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Timestamp for the recorded market data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the market data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the market data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("pair_id") REFERENCES trading_pairs ("pair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_fees" (
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee entry */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trading pair */,
  "fee_type" TEXT /* Type of fee (e.g., trading fee, withdrawal fee) */,
  "fee_amount" REAL /* Amount of the fee */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the fee entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the fee entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_fees_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("pair_id") REFERENCES trading_pairs ("pair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "date_registered" TEXT /* Date when the user registered on the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., view, edit, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was assigned */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_history" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the trade */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trading pair */,
  "trade_amount" REAL /* Amount of cryptocurrency traded */,
  "trade_price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the trade */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trade was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trade status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_history_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("pair_id") REFERENCES trading_pairs ("pair_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trading pair related to the trend */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the trend */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., bullish, bearish) */,
  "trend_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trend */,
  "trend_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trend */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trend was identified */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trend was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("pair_id") REFERENCES trading_pairs ("pair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., price alert, market trend update) */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Whether the notification has been read (e.g., unread, read) */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market summary entry */,
  "summary_date" TEXT /* Date of the summary */,
  "total_pairs_traded" INTEGER /* Total number of trading pairs traded on that date */,
  "total_volume" REAL /* Total trading volume across all pairs */,
  "high_price" REAL /* The highest price across all trading pairs on that date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* The lowest price across all trading pairs on that date */,
  "price_change" REAL /* The overall price change across all trading pairs on that date */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the summary was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the summary was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_volume" (
  "volume_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volume entry */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trading pair */,
  "volume_date" TEXT /* Date of the volume entry */,
  "daily_volume" REAL /* Total volume traded on that date for the pair */,
  "high_volume" REAL /* The highest volume traded for the pair on that date */,
  "low_volume" REAL /* The lowest volume traded for the pair on that date */,
  "volume_change" REAL /* The volume change for the pair on that date */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the volume entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the volume entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volume_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_volume_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("pair_id") REFERENCES trading_pairs ("pair_id")
)
